text.*:
Central to the Star Wars Roleplaying Game is the venerable starship. Players will most often use some form of starship as transport from one location to another, and some campaigns may make extensive use of fighter craft in dogfights. The larger capital ships make for excellent set pieces and even a greater home for certain player groups.

The profiles presented in these tables are the key shared characteristics of starships. Crucial elements such as hyperspace capabilities, weapon loadouts, sensors, customizability, and capacity for cargo and passengers vary widely. In the category pages, tables will further break-down the type of vehicle and allow sorting by important features.

Contents

  • 1 SMALLCRAFT
    • 1.1 STARFIGHTERS
    • 1.2 SHUTTLES
  • 2 GUNBOATS & TRANSPORTS
    • 2.1 PATROL BOATS
    • 2.2 FREIGHTERS
    • 2.3 OTHER TRANSPORTS
  • 3 CAPITAL SHIPS
  • 4 STATIONS
  • 5 LEGENDARY
  • 6 POPULAR STARSHIPS
